product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I am really interested in it. Would you be open to negotiating the price a bit? Looking forward to hearing from you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! Wonderful to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED. It's truly a top-tier TV with its stunning OLED evo panel and incredible features. I'm open to discussing the price; what offer did you have in mind?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your offer! I'm interested in purchasing the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Considering my budget, would you be able to offer it for $1000?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your interest! The LG C3 is an exceptional TV, packed with features like the OLED evo panel and 4K 120Hz. While $1000 is below our cost for this premium model, I can offer you a special price of $1650. It's an incredible value for the ultimate home theater experience.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer! I appreciate the special price you've provided. Unfortunately, my budget for this purchase is $1100, so I won't be able to proceed at $1650. If you could consider my budget, I'd be happy to move forward.
